urdu transliteration text:
ay maa tum mujhe paas bulaalo mujhe pyaassataati heyO Mother, call me back to you, Thirst has become unbearable English Transliteration
@HujjatELC

english translation text: O Mother, call me back to you, Thirst has become unbearable

urdu transliteration text:
yaad aaye bohot mujhko tera jhula jhulanahyy, kabhi seene se laga ke tera lori sunanajab rayt garam pyaari maa mere tan kojalaati hey
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
I remember often how you would swing my cradle
And how you would hug me and sing me a lullaby
The hot sand burns my skin, O my beloved mother

urdu transliteration text:
jhule mey parha asghar din raat hey royahyy, jab pyaas bujhi iski to phir cheyn se soyamaqtal mey sakina phir kyu(n) ise dhoondne jaati hey
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Asghar would cry in the cradle day and night
Only when his thirst was quenched, did he sleep peacefully
Then why does Sakina go looking for him in the battlefield?

A lady is standing at the door of the tent
She keeps turning and looking towards the battlefield

urdu transliteration text:
@HujjatELC
Please come, to your sweet baby
english translation text: Oh Mother, I'm so scared where are you now?

urdu transliteration text:
@HujjatELC
(Now) I'm burning in these hot sands
english translation text:
I remember your hands cradling me closely mother
Holding me to your chest as you sung lullabies mother
Where are your loving soft hands

I remember the warmth of father, as he carried me
To the soldiers, begging for water, this was his one plea
(But) They quenched my thirst with an arrow
They broke your heart with that bow

I hear the soldiers shouting so loud, searching for my grave
Looking for my body, for my head, to put on display
My head was high on the spears
I see you break down in tears
